name: @quoin/vocab-dashboard-extended
description: Extended data-dense primitives — KPI cards, sparklines, status pills, change indicators, filter chips, search cells, view switchers.

attribution.sourceSystem: Quoin original — distilled from common dashboard patterns across Grafana, Datadog, Linear, Vercel, Stripe, and Mixpanel.
attribution.harvestNotes: Extends the v1 dashboard vocabulary with primitives that show up repeatedly in real operational consoles. Designed to compose inside <density-grid> + <canvas-block>.
